command:
You are the SpecOrch mission worker for this workspace. Continue implementation directly and keep file paths relative to cwd.

You are the SpecOrch builder for this issue workspace. Your current working directory IS the project root — all file paths must be relative to it. Move directly into implementation and verification. Minimize workflow narration and process summaries.

## Task
Issue-start smoke task. Work only inside this issue workspace.

1. Create or overwrite `.spec_orch_smoke/issue_start_builder.txt`.
2. Write exactly three lines:
   - `issue_id=SPC-1`
   - `smoke=issue_start_builder`
   - `workspace_ok=yes`
3. Do not modify `src/` or `tests/`.
4. Do not invoke `spec-orch`, daemon commands, or nested pipeline commands.
5. After writing the file, run the configured verification commands and report the results.

## Verification Commands
- smoke_check: `{python} -c from pathlib import Path; p=Path('.spec_orch_smoke/issue_start_builder.txt'); expected='issue_id=SPC-1\nsmoke=issue_start_builder\nworkspace_ok=yes\n'; actual=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert actual == expected, actual`
- build: `{python} -c print('issue-start smoke build ok')`

## Spec
# Build MVP runner

## Intent
- Issue: SPC-1
- Title: Build MVP runner

## Boundaries
- MVP prototype only

from pathlib import Path; p=Path('.spec_orch_smoke/issue_start_builder.txt'); expected='issue_id=SPC-1
smoke=issue_start_builder
workspace_ok=yes
'; actual=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert actual == expected, actual

mission_bootstrap.title: Fresh ACPX Mission E2E Narrow Smoke
mission_bootstrap.intent: Create one fresh local-only mission that proves ACPX execution by scaffolding exactly two tiny TypeScript contract files under src/contracts: mission_types.ts and artifact_types.ts. The first fresh path must stay minimal and only produce enough round artifacts to prove fresh execution before post-run workflow replay.
acceptance_criteria: A fresh mission can be created for this run.
The plan stays within one wave and at most two work packets.
The mission can be launched and produce fresh round artifacts.
Post-run workflow replay can validate the resulting dashboard surfaces.
constraints: Keep the first fresh mission path narrow and local-only.
Do not reuse historical round artifacts as fresh proof.
Plan budget: at most 1 wave and at most 2 work packets.
Only touch src/contracts/mission_types.ts and src/contracts/artifact_types.ts inside worker workspaces.
Do not implement dashboard runtime changes, test harnesses, or replay engines during the fresh proof run.

acceptance_review.summary: Post-run dashboard workflow is fully functional. All 4 required interactions (launcher open, missions mode switch, transcript tab, acceptance tab) succeeded. All 6 routes rendered without errors. The round decision reflects a builder-side verification harness bug (double-nested import paths), not a UI or workflow failure.

exploratory.summary: The fresh ACPX mission E2E smoke executed successfully and the post-run dashboard workflow validated across six routes with zero console errors. All coverage expectations (launcher entry, mission inventory, mission detail, transcript, acceptance) are marked complete. Two interaction log gaps on transcript/acceptance routes are noted but do not constitute blocking failures; they are held for operator review. The round summary correctly identifies the verification harness bug as a pre-existing issue, not a file defect.

campaign.goal: Dogfood the output from an operator perspective.

/.description: Open the launcher to establish operator context.
Confirm launcher actions are visible before exploring mission surfaces.

/?mission=fresh-acpx-20260402054507-93e4.description: Confirm mission detail is ready before branching into adjacent surfaces.
Probe the transcript surface from the overview entry point.
Confirm the transcript branch became active.
Confirm mission detail is ready before judging transcript discoverability.
Confirm transcript controls are visible on the route.
Reset transcript filters before judging discoverability.
Confirm transcript evidence is shown in the broadest view.
Wait for the transcript timeline to expose at least one evidence block.
Inspect the currently active transcript block for context continuity.
Confirm transcript evidence details are visible after selecting a block.
Follow the acceptance affordance exposed by the mission context rail.

coverage_expectations: operator can inspect mission detail from the overview surface
operator can expand into adjacent mission surfaces
operator can inspect at least one deeper evidence surface
required_interactions: switch into adjacent surfaces when the task suggests it
stop_conditions: stop when the route budget is exhausted
stop when no adjacent surface adds new operator evidence
stop after confirming a materially broken flow
